summary: Dow fell 280.12 pts (0.57%) to 48,861.81 on Wednesday, fifth straight losing day. S&P 500 down 0.04% to 7,135.95, Nasdaq up 0.04% to 24,673.24. Market driven by Fed holding rates steady and US blockade of Iranian ports driving oil prices higher. Gas at $4.176/gal. Mag 7 earnings mixed: Meta tumbled 9% on capex guidance, Eli Lilly +7%, Caterpillar +6%, Amazon +2%.
